prompt:
Fix the failing PWA e2e test on PR #16. Check out the PR branch (agent/20260308-1621-3c9f) and fix the issue.

The test at client/e2e/pwa.spec.ts:8 fails because fetching /manifest.webmanifest returns a 404 during dev mode. vite-plugin-pwa generates the manifest at build time but in dev mode it serves it through a virtual module.

Fix the test to work in dev mode. Options:
1. Check for the manifest link in the HTML head instead of fetching the file directly
2. Or fetch the manifest URL from the link tag's href attribute (which vite-plugin-pwa injects)

The simplest fix: instead of fetching /manifest.webmanifest directly, find the <link rel='manifest'> tag in the page and verify it exists. Or check if vite-plugin-pwa dev mode serves it at a different path.

Read the existing pwa.spec.ts first, then fix it. Also verify the other test files don't need changes.

Run npm run lint and npm run build to verify.
Push to the existing PR branch and do NOT create a new PR.
